hero.title: Applied Tools
hero.description: Practical utilities designed to solve real development problems. Each tool focuses on usability, clarity and engineering quality.

items.title: API Schema Visualizer
items.description: Generate structured visual documentation from OpenAPI schemas.

items.title: Prompt Optimizer
items.description: Analyze and refine prompts for structured AI responses.

items.title: JSON Diff Engine
items.description: Compare large JSON structures and visualize structural differences.

items.title: Markdown → Clean PDF
items.description: Convert structured markdown into formatted export-ready PDFs.
